projects.title: Heirloom App
projects.description: An AI-powered system with a custom dual-memory architecture (short-term + long-term) for persistent conversations. Features real-time context extraction, semantic search, and secure multi-user chat isolation. Includes unified APIs optimized for web, iOS, and Android platforms, yielding a 40% performance gain.

projects.title: Storiboard
projects.description: A feature-rich social blogging platform for creators. Features OTP-based authentication, JWT sessions, and RBAC. Includes async Redis job queues for feed generation, a personalized feed algorithm, cursor-based pagination, and a full rich-media post system with threaded comments, likes, and bookmarks.

projects.title: DE-Studio Agency
projects.description: A premium, fully responsive agency website showcasing design services and digital product craftsmanship. Utilizes smooth animations, a glassmorphic aesthetic, and JSON-driven dynamic layouts to deliver a high-end agency presentation.

projects.title: Chatcrypt
projects.description: A secure, anonymous chat application with ephemeral messages that automatically delete. Features real-time WebSocket messaging, media sharing, and server health status monitoring, built to ensure privacy and low-latency interaction.
